concerns.text: Plan states ≈30k prime knots at crossing number 13, but spec acknowledges NO verified source for Knot Atlas data (research.md: 'NO verified source found'). If Knot Atlas is incomplete, the entire dataset foundation is compromised. Methodology requires verified data source completeness claim.

Bridge number computation via Schubert's decomposition is NP-hard for general knots; arc index via Birman-Menasco is also computationally intractable for many knots. Plan assumes ≥99% invariant coverage (SC-006) without addressing feasibility. Many knots in Knot Atlas may have unknown bridge/arc indices.

Composite score validation against arc index and Seifert circle count is circular: both are computed in the same pipeline, not external ground truth. Correlation between two computed measures doesn't validate predictive power. Need external validation reference.

Research question explicitly asks about knots ≤13, but Phase 1 validates only ≤10 (≈1,701 vs ≈30k knots). Conclusions about 'crossing number ≤13' will be unsupported by validation. Scope boundary must be reflected in research question or validation expanded.

ANOVA testing for alternating vs non-alternating groups is labeled exploratory, but spec language implies it tests the main hypothesis. Correlation/regression answers the research question; ANOVA tests group differences. Statistical claims must distinguish these.

Performance goal 'Complete analysis on ≤13 crossing number dataset (≈30k knots) in <2 hours' is unrealistic if invariant computation is NP-hard. Bridge number computation alone may exceed this for many knots.

SC-008 requires 'A validation script MUST be included in docs/reproducibility/ that automates [tie-breaking] check.' The plan's docs/reproducibility/ directory lists tie_breaking_rules.md but no validation script. While code/reproducibility/validation_scripts.py exists, the spec explicitly requires the script in docs/reproducibility/. Either move the script or document its presence in the plan structure.

FR-001 cites Knot Atlas (https://katlas.org/wiki/Main_Page) as primary data source, but spec.md explicitly states 'NO verified source URLs exist for Knot Atlas' and research.md notes 'NO verified source found'. Plan cannot execute without verified, stable data source.

Assumptions cite Hoste-Thistlethwaite-Weeks (1998) for prime knot counts (27,635 at crossing number 13), but no programmatic access method is provided. Validation against this enumeration requires verified dataset access which spec acknowledges does not exist.

Dataset Strategy table lists 'Knot Atlas' and 'KnotInfo' with access methods, but notes 'No fabricated URLs will be cited'. This creates ambiguity about what data will actually be available at runtime.

Performance goal states 'Complete analysis on ≤13 crossing number dataset (≈30k knots) in <2 hours' but spec.md states crossing number 13 alone has 27,635 prime knots. Total dataset size for ≤13 would exceed 30k, impacting compute feasibility.
FR-001 data format specification incomplete: 'Data format follows Knot Atlas JSON schema as documented at or CSV export' has missing URL after 'documented at'.

Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires all external citations verified before review points. Spec acknowledges NO verified sources for Knot Atlas/KnotInfo, creating conflict between constitution requirement and data availability.

plan.md Data Flow references 'knot_atlas_cleaned.csv', 'regression_models.pkl', 'composite_scores.csv' but data-model.md defines entities (KnotRecord, InvariantsDataset, RegressionModel, CompositeComplexityScore) without mapping these file names to entities. Cross-doc mismatch on artifact naming.

KnotRecord entity in data-model.md has 'source_checksum' but dataset.schema.yaml uses 'raw_data_hash' and knot_record.schema.yaml uses 'source_checksum'. Also dataset.schema.yaml requires 'alternating_classifiable' and 'computation_timestamp' not in data-model.md. Schema-entity mismatch.
dataset.schema.yaml includes 'diagram_representation' enum field not defined in data-model.md KnotRecord entity. Plan does not exercise this contract field. Contract has unexercised field.

Constitution Check table claims 'COMPLIANT' for all 7 principles without evidence mapping. Principle IV (SSoT) requires explicit SSoT designation per FR-030, but plan does not designate which artifact is SSoT for what. Missing SSoT designation violates Principle IV.

Principle II (Verified Accuracy) marked COMPLIANT but plan does not describe how Reference-Validator Agent will verify citations. Plan should include explicit citation validation workflow per Constitution Principle II. Missing implementation detail for constitutional compliance.

quickstart.md Step 2 outputs 'invariants_computed.csv' but data-model.md defines InvariantsDataset entity with JSON schema structure. File format (CSV) does not match entity schema type. Cross-doc format mismatch.
